summary: Iteration 14: Verified Visual Report minimal-text requirements. Backend POST /api/generate with output_type='report' returns exactly 5 sections with 2 bullets max per section, subtitles, stats, workflow steps (for visualType='workflow'), and imageKeywords. visualType distribution shows 2 'workflow' + 3 'stat' + 0 'none'. All bullets under 10 words. Frontend Export button triggers renderVisualReport function.
passed_tests: 3. Backend POST /api/generate with output_type='report' returns structured slides_data
4. Backend: Report has exactly 5 sections (max 5 requirement met)
5. Backend: All sections have max 2 bullets (requirement met)
6. Backend: All bullets under 10 words (0 violations)
7. Backend: visualType distribution: 2 workflow + 3 stat + 0 none (not all 'none')
8. Backend: Workflow sections have workflowSteps arrays with 5 steps each
9. Backend: Stat sections have stat values (e.g., '3', '4', '30') with labels
10. Backend: Every section has imageKeyword for AI image generation
11. Backend: Every section has subtitle (max 10 words)

19. Frontend: downloadOutput function calls renderVisualReport for report type (line 1404-1406)
critical_code_review_comments: server.py (line 645-693): generate_report prompt correctly specifies 5 sections, 2 bullets max (8 words), visualType distribution, workflowSteps, and imageKeyword
server.py (line 707): Hard cap enforced: sec['bullets'] = sec['bullets'][:2]
server.py (line 664-667): visualType options documented as 'workflow', 'stat', or 'none' with required distribution
reportRenderer.js (line 39-73): renderVisualReport generates images for up to 5 sections with progress toasts
reportRenderer.js (line 46): Image generation limited to 5 sections: toGen = sections.filter(...).slice(0, 5)
NotebookLM_Workspace.jsx (line 1404-1406): Export triggers renderVisualReport for report type outputs
seed_data_creation: Used existing indexed sources: SOW-H@H, H@H Phased Scope, Slide Deck
context_for_next_testing_agent: Visual Report minimal-text feature fully verified. Backend returns exactly 5 sections with 2 bullets max each (under 10 words), visualType='workflow' or 'stat' (not all 'none'), workflowSteps for workflow sections, and imageKeyword for each section. Frontend Export button calls renderVisualReport which generates AI images for 5 sections and renders canvas as PNG. The existing reports in DB may have old format (6+ sections, 4+ bullets); newly generated reports follow the new minimal-text structure.

verified_requirements.2_bullets_max_per_section: VERIFIED - All sections have exactly 2 bullets
verified_requirements.bullets_under_10_words: VERIFIED - All bullets are 4-6 words (well under limit)
verified_requirements.imageKeyword_per_section: VERIFIED - All sections have specific 4-5 word imageKeywords
